languages.text: {n}Капитан Дунавски бросает на вас заговорщический взгляд.{/n} "Добро пожаловать на Зарков, добро пожаловать в Клеть. Ваша Светлость, прошу, я бы хотела аудиенции с глазу на глаз".

traits.locale_text: {n}Капитан Дунавски бросает на вас заговорщический взгляд.{/n} "Добро пожаловать на Зарков, добро пожаловать в Клеть. Ваша Светлость, прошу, я бы хотела аудиенции с глазу на глаз".
traits.speaker: CaptainVedkaDunavski

languages.text: {n}Captain Dunawski gives you a conspiratorial look.{/n} "Welcome to Zarkov, welcome to the Cage. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I would ask for a private audience."
languages.original_text: {n}Капитан Дунавски бросает на вас заговорщический взгляд.{/n} "Добро пожаловать на Зарков, добро пожаловать в Клеть. Ваша Светлость, прошу, я бы хотела аудиенции с глазу на глаз".

traits.locale_text: {n}Captain Dunawski gives you a conspiratorial look.{/n} "Welcome to Zarkov, welcome to the Cage. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, please, I would ask for a private audience."
{n}Captain Dunawski gives you a conspiratorial look.{/n} "Welcome to Zarkov, welcome to the Cage. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I would ask for a private audience."

{n}Captain Dunawski gives you a conspiratorial look.{/n} "Welcome to Zarkov, welcome to Tsar-Cage. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, please, I would like an audience with you in private." {n}Nodding to you in farewell, she also heads off, turning around to glance back at you every now and then.{/n}
{n}Captain Dunawski gives you a conspiratorial look.{/n} "Welcome to Zarkov, welcome to the Cage. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, please, I would ask for a private audience."
{n}Captain Dunawski gives you a conspiratorial look.{/n} "Welcome to Zarkov, welcome to the Cage. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I would ask for a private audience."
{n}Captain Dunawski gives you a conspiratorial look.{/n} "Welcome to Zarkov, welcome to the Cage. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I would ask for a private audience."

languages.text: {n}ダンワスキー船長があなたに怪しい顔をする。{/n}「ザルコフへようこそ、ツァー・ケージへようこそ。貴方様、お時間頂戴します。お二人で私室で会話をさせて頂きたいのです。」と。あなたに別れを告げ、彼女は去っていく。時々振り返ってあなたを見る。
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski gives you a conspiratorial look.{/n} "Welcome to Zarkov, welcome to Tsar-Cage. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, please, I would like an audience with you in private." {n}Nodding to you in farewell, she also heads off, turning around to glance back at you every now and then.{/n}

traits.locale_text: ダンワスキー船長があなたに怪しい顔をする。「ザルコフへようこそ、ツァー・ケージへようこそ。貴方様、お時間頂戴します。お二人で私室で会話をさせて頂きたいのです。」と。あなたに別れを告げ、彼女は去っていく。時々振り返ってあなたを見る。

languages.text: {n}Captain Dunawski wirft dir einen verschwörerischen Blick zu.{/n} "Willkommen auf Zarkov, willkommen im Käfig. Bitte, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, ich möchte um eine Privataudienz ersuchen."
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski gives you a conspiratorial look.{/n} "Welcome to Zarkov, welcome to the Cage. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I would ask for a private audience."

traits.locale_text: {n}Captain Dunawski wirft dir einen verschwörerischen Blick zu.{/n} "Willkommen auf Zarkov, willkommen im Käfig. Bitte, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, ich möchte um eine Privataudienz ersuchen."

languages.text: {n}La capitaine Dunawski vous adresse une œillade conspiratrice.{/n} « Bienvenue sur Zarkov, bienvenue à la Cage. Avec votre permission, Votre Seigneurie, j'aimerais m'entretenir avec vous en privé. »
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski gives you a conspiratorial look.{/n} "Welcome to Zarkov, welcome to the Cage. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I would ask for a private audience."

traits.locale_text: {n}La capitaine Dunawski vous adresse une œillade conspiratrice.{/n} « Bienvenue sur Zarkov, bienvenue à la Cage. Avec votre permission, Votre Seigneurie, j'aimerais m'entretenir avec vous en privé. »

languages.text: {n}La capitana Dunawski te lanza una mirada conspiradora.{/n} «Sea bienvenid{mf|o|a} a Zarkov y a la Jaula. Mi{mf|lord|lady}, me gustaría pedirle una audiencia privada».
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski gives you a conspiratorial look.{/n} "Welcome to Zarkov, welcome to the Cage. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I would ask for a private audience."

traits.locale_text: {n}La capitana Dunawski te lanza una mirada conspiradora.{/n} «Sea bienvenid{mf|o|a} a Zarkov y a la Jaula. Mi{mf|lord|lady}, me gustaría pedirle una audiencia privada».

languages.text: {n}Yüzbaşı Dunawski sana gizemli bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "Zarkov'a, Kafes'e hoş geldiniz. Ne olursunuz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, benimle özel olarak görüşmenizi rica ediyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski gives you a conspiratorial look.{/n} "Welcome to Zarkov, welcome to the Cage. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I would ask for a private audience."

traits.locale_text: {n}Yüzbaşı Dunawski sana gizemli bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "Zarkov'a, Kafes'e hoş geldiniz. Ne olursunuz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, benimle özel olarak görüşmenizi rica ediyorum."

languages.text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡上尉向你投来一个心照不宣的眼神。{/n}“欢迎来到扎尔科夫，欢迎来到牢笼。舰长大人，恳请您准许我单独觐见。”
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski gives you a conspiratorial look.{/n} "Welcome to Zarkov, welcome to the Cage. Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I would ask for a private audience."

traits.locale_text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡上尉向你投来一个心照不宣的眼神。{/n}“欢迎来到扎尔科夫，欢迎来到牢笼。舰长大人，恳请您准许我单独觐见。”
